ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "isbn_10" TEXT /* ISBN-10 */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "book_format" TEXT /* Format of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "book_weight" REAL /* Weight of the book */,
  "book_length" REAL /* Length of the book */,
  "book_width" REAL /* Width of the book */,
  "book_height" REAL /* Height of the book */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the author was born */,
  "author_bio_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the author's bio */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Author's social media links */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards or recognition received by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the publisher */,
  "publisher_type" TEXT /* Type of publisher */,
  "imprint" TEXT /* Publisher's imprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Parent genre ID */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "edition_number" INTEGER /* Number of the edition */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the edition was published */,
  "edition_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the edition */,
  "edition_format" TEXT /* Format of the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_editions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of books sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the book */,
  "sale_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the book was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store */,
  "store_website" TEXT /* Store's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the book */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* User's profile picture URL */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_copies" (
  "copy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book copy */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the edition of the book */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the book copy */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the book copy is stored */,
  "copy_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the book copy status was last updated */,
  "copy_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the book copy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("copy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_copies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_copies_edition_id FOREIGN KEY ("edition_id") REFERENCES book_editions ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_copies_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "location_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
